todos.content: Inspect the project structure and key files
Analyze architecture, dependencies, and runtime setup
Review current implementation against production-readiness requirements
Plan and apply backend fixes: streaming, normalization, Redis cache, TPM, async writes, logging, metrics, CORS
Plan and apply frontend/content fixes: Google-only auth, remove test artifacts, fix hero copy, StatsBar, Ctrl+M
Git push and Railway env var checklist
Restore hidden Ctrl+M admin access and remove visible Admin nav button
Fix admin panel loading regression introduced during rewrite
Rebuild, verify, and push the admin access fix
Add model deletion support and practical route switching in the admin panel
Improve incidents/alerts to expose full error context for 502s and request failures
Rebuild and push the admin UX and observability improvements
